objectText: Do not stop slicing at the first warning. Identify whether it is advisory, stale, false-local, or authoritative-host evidence, then fix or quarantine accordingly.

Monsoon Fire kiln firing service pricing has three lanes: low fire, mid fire, and custom; each lane is priced by the half shelf. Volume pricing and cubic-inch pricing are not used.
